recentTweets.text:
I had a productive meeting with the Navajo Nation Resources and Development Committee in Washington, D.C. this week. We discussed key legislative priorities, such as the production of uranium and other critical minerals. 

I’m grateful for my relationship with the leaders of this https://t.co/5fEhXSUfdO

As deadlines approach for the Colorado River negotiations, I'm working with key stakeholders to advocate for the best possible deal for Arizona. Too much is at stake for Arizona to draw the short straw, given our state's contributions to the nation. https://t.co/SXi1d7JQYg

Earlier this Congress, I reintroduced the Buzz Off Act to prevent federal law enforcement agencies from using drones to conduct warrantless surveillance of U.S. citizens.

We must ensure our laws reflect technological advances to protect the constitutional liberties of the https://t.co/QHO8n3u60r

I applaud Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. for its recent commitment of $100 billion into our state - in addition to its existing infrastructure. This continued development will be an economic boon to Arizona in the years ahead. https://t.co/T0TuZyA8dQ

Major kudos to our federal authorities for their efforts to bring this fraudster to justice. This apprehension sends another message to bad actors scheming to steal American tax dollars that they cannot hide from the long arm of the United States government.

As America marks its 250th anniversary, it's worth remembering that the constitutional safeguard of the speech or debate clause predates the nation itself.

That fact proves how fundamental this protection is meant to be for the people's representatives.

But Jack Smith trampled https://t.co/tUKeBjgChJ

Violence is never the answer to resolving political differences in the United States. While we may not always see eye to eye on policies, attacks on law enforcement are un-American and should be reprehensible to law-abiding citizens. https://t.co/f04cPmvS1q

Earlier this week, my office welcomed the Hubble family from Gilbert to the U.S. Capitol for a tour.

If you are visiting Washington, D.C. in the near future, please don't hesitate to reach out to my team for a tour of this historic complex. We'd be thrilled to assist. https://t.co/I0wpD1h70U

Our East Valley first responders are the best in the nation, and they are working hard every day to serve our communities. Thank you to these Mesa fire fighters for their efforts to save this dog. https://t.co/wRnweo0U1j

When I took office in January 2017, I asked my team to make sure we did everything in our power to assist the hardworking men and women of our district when they came to us for help. 

Day after day, we've delivered for Arizona's Fifth Congressional District. It's been an honor https://t.co/BRqGdnYSZ1

I'm grateful for American service members like U.S. Coast Guard rescue swimmer Scott Ruskan, who do not hesitate to put their lives on the line to save their fellow man. These individuals are true heroes, and their example inspires so many around them.

"Semper Paratus"
Glad to hear that this Border Patrol agent is recovering after being stabbed. The men and women who help enforce our laws deserve our prayers and support. https://t.co/jtUQnqnrSk

Yesterday, we learned that the Biden-led DOJ and FBI spied on Members of Congress, accessing privileged information transmitted to and from former Trump-White House personnel during Special Counsel Jack Smith’s out-of-control investigation.

I was one of 44 Members of Congress https://t.co/7QwDPKlC2l

This Congress, I've introduced the Space Research Innovation Act to allow the National Aeronautics and Space Administration to partner with universities to conduct deep-space research and mission development.

Not only do American universities benefit from some of the world's https://t.co/kcrTO56rnI

American citizens come first.

This principle isn't radical. It's the basic bargain of citizenship, and this Congress should state that clearly.

Today, I spoke in favor of H. Res. 1394, which condemns prosecution policies that give preferential treatment to foreign nationals https://t.co/Ru9GTDTGjr

Good luck to all the students and teachers heading back to school in the coming weeks. May this upcoming school year be filled with learning and meaningful friendships that carry our young people into a productive future. https://t.co/chEQLYiEYv

The men and women in law enforcement serve not for glory or recognition but for the opportunity to make a positive difference in someone's life.

I'm thankful for all our law enforcement agents across the country and their commitment to the law and to helping others.

Have an issue with the Social Security Administration? My office can help you obtain answers regarding your case.

As always, we are grateful for every opportunity to serve the people of Arizona's Fifth Congressional District. We stand ready to assist. https://t.co/MCTyYJ3qJC
Thank you for your heroic service to the Valley, K-9 Zadie. Rest in peace. https://t.co/vq1UM5b2Yc

Great news for the American economy today with this report on plunging inflation. 

President Trump and congressional Republicans continue working to relieve economic pressures and restore the American Dream for hardworking taxpayers. 

The best is yet to come.

We appreciate our first responders who are working day and night to keep people safe in Valley communities. Please exercise common sense when engaging in recreational activities outdoors so we don't unnecessarily strain personnel and resources. https://t.co/KZMLAwQ45g

As our national debt nears $40 trillion, Congress must take action to curb our spending before our children and grandchildren inherit a fiscal catastrophe. That's why I've introduced a constitutional amendment requiring the federal government to operate under a balanced budget, https://t.co/3go9dBakHj

Kudos to these U.S. Marshals for their heroic efforts to rescue this girl and bring these individuals to justice. We owe a great debt to the men and women who serve in law enforcement agencies and take courageous actions to protect our communities.
https://t.co/ycQlsFZ0AW

It appears the Arizona monsoon is upon us, meaning we should take precautions as storms intensify around our communities in the weeks ahead. Hopefully, the Valley gets a good deal of rain this month; we need it desperately. https://t.co/Bvrc3q39Ao

Two years ago today, the world watched in horror as the 45th - and soon to be 47th - President of the United States narrowly survived an assassin's bullet by the hand of divine Providence. This nation has received many miracles over the course of its 250 years, and this event was https://t.co/CgosOwCbyO

Cindy and I are praying for the family members of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, who suddenly passed away after decades of honorable service to our nation, starting with over six years in our Air Force. May he rest in peace and be remembered for his unquestionable love of the men

Every week, my office obtains wins for our constituents, who come to us for answers in their cases with any given federal agency. We are always thrilled to report back with good news.

Our team is privileged to serve the great people of Arizona's Fifth Congressional District. https://t.co/zxYr58DB60

Earlier this week, I joined @broomheadKTAR on the air to commemorate the one-year anniversary of the Working Families Tax Cuts being signed into law. I was pleased to vote for this legislation - the second major tax cuts package in the past decade. https://t.co/Xj0EobgeK0
Happy 100th Birthday, Dave Keaggy! You continue to be an inspiration to everyone around you. Thank you for your service to our nation. https://t.co/4inf7dtKMl

There are a lot of illegitimate entities across the nation being busted for defrauding taxpayers - with many more left to uncover. I applaud the federal government's efforts to hold bad actors accountable to the law and protect taxpayer dollars. 

Local and state governments

I was privileged to attend Coffee & a Mic with Chris Clark of the Queen Creek Chamber this morning to give a federal update on housing, water, and immigration. Thank you, Queen Creek Vice-Mayor Bryan McClure, for being in attendance. https://t.co/mf65KbnrRj

Thank you, Royal Cothrun, for your kindhearted actions in helping an elderly woman in need. We all can learn from your example and assist those around us who are in more vulnerable stages of life. https://t.co/un3HHzamWZ

My office was pleased to welcome the Yin Family from Gilbert for a recent tour of the U.S. Capitol. We hope you all enjoyed your visit.

If you have made plans to come to Washington, D.C., and would like a tour of the Capitol, please reach out to my office. We'd love to help. https://t.co/V9tZPMN1zz

Valley residents, now may be a great time to adopt a four-legged friend desperate to find a forever home if you're looking for a pet. Check out the dogs available at these shelters.
https://t.co/biM00ejmgB
Our continued prayers are with the fire fighters battling the blazes around our state in defense of Arizona communities. Thank you for your dedicated service. https://t.co/9FgM2PtCLt

I appreciated the opportunity to meet with Maricopa County Attorney Rachel Mitchell and others in our law enforcement community earlier today. These individuals are working every day to bring bad actors to justice and make our communities safer.

Since the start of 2026, my office has recovered over $2,100,000 through 508 cases for the people of Arizona’s Fifth Congressional District.

It is my honor to assist the hardworking men and women of the East Valley with their issues with federal agencies.
https://t.co/uarBLiOHrQ https://t.co/2aleEXDCU2

There's still a lot of work left to be done, but tremendous progress has been made to improve the service to our veterans who made sacrifices for this nation's freedoms. Thank you, President @realDonaldTrump & @SecVetAffairs Doug Collins for your efforts. https://t.co/CfOsJfAbvQ

The biggest success of the Working Families Tax Cuts is that we stopped a $4 trillion tax increase from hitting hard-working Americans across the United States. That would have been really bad for the country—maybe the death knell, economically speaking. https://t.co/hHK3KlO3Af

It was my honor to meet with Casey and Meggan Murph in Washington, D.C., last week to discuss their fight to save their ranch and livelihood from egregious government overreach. The Murphs’ fight is an American fight: protecting our ranching heritage, grazing rights, and the https://t.co/Fy9oXMttol

One of my top priorities for my final term in the U.S. House is working with federal, state, and local partners to put Arizona in the best position for a Colorado River agreement. It's  critical for our state - and the nation - that we receive a fair share of the water.

I'm grateful for those who serve our veterans. Recently, my office had the opportunity to assist one of our VA nurses with an issue he had with a federal agency. We were thankful for the favorable result. https://t.co/aBzQSKJ7Pd
Congratulations to Landon Hairston on another great honor. Looking forward to seeing this young man represent our nation on the USA Baseball Collegiate National Team.

Innocent Americans have been harmed because some U.S. cities and states refuse to cooperate with federal authorities to ensure that criminally violent illegal aliens are not released back into unsuspecting communities. I'm outraged at this continuing lack of cooperation, which https://t.co/1ExrOqFQmn

My office was pleased to welcome the Morgan Family from Chandler for a recent tour of the U.S. Capitol.

If you're visiting our nation's capital in the near future, please don't hesitate to reach out to my team for a tour of this historic complex. We'd love to assist. https://t.co/gFa1LNaOYr
Congratulations to Andres Robles, who recently became the 1 billionth guest at Disneyland. Many Arizonans love visiting the happiest place on earth. https://t.co/TwKTKbikXb
One year of the Working Families Tax Cuts - the best is yet to come for the American people! https://t.co/YaRN1skH5o

Many Valley residents travel to Lake Powell over the summer for recreation. With the Babylon Fire raging across the region, please heed warnings and guidance from officials if you have plans to be there in the near future. As always, we are praying for the first responders

Thank you to the Salvation Army for these efforts to keep people cool in our Valley communities during Arizona's hot summer months. Be sure to look out for your loved ones and neighbors in the weeks ahead. https://t.co/KVnBu3TWuw

Cindy and I join millions across the nation in prayer this week for Erika Kirk and other family members, who are again experiencing immense pain over the memories of Charlie's assassination. We pray for justice to be done and divine peace to cover those left behind.

Our prayers continue to be with the family of Nick Hutcherson, who gave his life doing what he loved in service to the communities around him. May God comfort their hearts and give them peace in the knowledge that their loved one died a hero.
https://t.co/TmbnXIaMjI

Those in our Armed Forces deserve the peace of mind of knowing that their pay will arrive in their accounts as promised. 

My office stands ready to assist these brave men and women should they encounter any issues. We appreciate their service and pray for their safety. https://t.co/iXhYxsSVQd

Almost six months ago, the U.S. House passed my Coercion and Sexual Abuse Free Environment (CSAFE) Act to give law enforcement the clear authority necessary to hunt down and prosecute the predators who exploit children. It is more important than ever to send this bill to the
TUNE IN: I'm about to join @broomheadKTAR on the air to commemorate the one-year anniversary of the Working Families Tax Cuts. Listen at 9:30am on @KTAR923 or online https://t.co/Vkw9JETGCk

This report is exactly why I introduced the Restoring the American Homebuyers Dream Act, which would open more opportunities for citizens and legal residents to own homes without competition from people in the country illegally. https://t.co/DfWqkNh66o

Our federal investigators and prosecutors are working around the clock to remove criminals from the streets and protect innocent families in their communities. Another job well done here.
https://t.co/qBSapBs86N

The Working Families Tax Cuts have already paid dividends for everyday Americans around the country in the first year - with so many benefits and savings yet to be realized. It was my honor to support this legislation to help families in my district.
https://t.co/N456RKeuRz
USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA USA

I join our community of first responders in mourning the loss of Captain David Tavares, who honorably served the East Valley for almost two decades. May God comfort his family, friends, and former colleagues. https://t.co/2RRZAAWWFQ

Today, I'm filled with immense gratitude to mark the 250th anniversary of America's founding. No nation in human history has done more good for its people - and for millions around the world - than ours. We have been given such a gift.

God bless the United States of America. https://t.co/cymnfYfyQA

This is great news for rural Arizona and our electric grid. Cholla was shut down by the Obama Administration as part of the Green New Deal. I'm glad to see APS finding a new use for this plant that provides affordable, reliable energy and creates jobs.
https://t.co/3qvu2TGwfx

Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
